title: Middle Office Ops Lead
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a Middle Office Operations Lead with project and stakeholder management experience to support our transformation programme.

Key Responsibilities

Operational Management

  • Lead and manage BAU middle office operations, ensuring daily deliverables are met with accuracy and timeliness.
  • Act as an operational escalation point, resolving issues efficiently and proactively.
  • Identify operational risks and drive problem‑solving initiatives to maintain service quality.

Leadership & Team Management

  • Provide strong people leadership to the BAU operations team, maintaining performance and engagement during the cover period.
  • Support team development and ensure processes are followed consistently.
  • Foster collaboration across internal teams and functions.

Stakeholder & Senior Management Engagement

  • Engage effectively with senior management, providing clear updates on performance, risks, and key issues.
  • Manage communication with internal stakeholders and external service providers as required.
  • Coordinate across multiple teams to ensure seamless service delivery.

What We’re Looking For

  • Proven experience in middle office operations within financial services.
  • Strong hands‑on operational background combined with leadership experience.
  • Excellent problem‑solving and escalation management skills.
  • Ability to communicate confidently with senior stakeholders.
  • Experience coordinating across multiple teams and external vendors.

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Job Reference: JN -012026-49439

EA Registration No.: R23116829, Neo Si Qi Faith

Allegis Group Singapore Pte Ltd, Company Reg No. 200909448N, EA Licence No. 10C4544

postedCompany.description:
ALLEGIS GROUP SINGAPORE PRIVATE LIMITED

Allegis Group is the global leader in talent solutions focused on working harder and caring more than any other provider. We’ll go further to understand the needs of our people – our clients, our candidates, and our employees – and to consistently deliver on our promise of an unsurpassed quality experience. That’s the Allegis Group difference, and it’s consistent across every Allegis Group company. With more than US$11billion in annual revenues and over 500 locations across the globe, our network provides businesses with a comprehensive suite of talent solutions — without sacrificing the niche expertise required to ensure a successful partnership. Our specialised group of companies includes: Aerotek, TEKsystems, Allegis Global Solutions, Aston Carter, Major, Lindsey & Africa, Allegis Partners, MarketSource, and EASi. Visit www.AllegisGroup.com to learn more.
